meta.title: Data Analytics Certification Program | Teksversity
meta.description: Build job-ready data analytics skills with Teksversity’s certification program covering Excel, SQL, Python, data visualization, and real-world projects.

@graph.name: Data Analytics Certification Course
@graph.description: The Data Analytics Certification Course at Teksversity builds practical skills in data analysis using Excel, SQL, Python, and data visualization techniques applied to real-world scenarios.

mainEntity.name: What is the Data Analytics Certification Course about?

acceptedAnswer.text: The course teaches data analysis fundamentals including Excel, SQL, Python, and data visualization to help learners analyze and interpret real-world datasets.

mainEntity.name: What tools are covered in the Data Analytics course?

acceptedAnswer.text: Students learn Excel for data handling, SQL for database queries, Python for analysis, and visualization techniques for presenting insights.

mainEntity.name: Is this Data Analytics course suitable for beginners?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, the program starts with foundational concepts and gradually moves into practical analytics workflows and real-time projects.

mainEntity.name: What career roles are available after Data Analytics certification?

acceptedAnswer.text: Learners can pursue roles such as Data Analyst, Business Analyst, Reporting Analyst, BI Associate, or Data Visualization Specialist.

mainEntity.name: Does the course include hands-on projects?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, the training includes practical datasets, analysis exercises, and projects that simulate real business data scenarios.

overViewOfOnline.description: The data analysis certification course is designed to turn learners into data-driven professionals ready for the digital era. This program blends analytics, AI, and business intelligence to help you uncover insights that power smarter decisions. Through hands-on projects, real-time dashboards, and advanced tools like Python, SQL, and Power BI, you’ll gain practical expertise that employers demand. Whether you’re a student or a professional, this course empowers you to transform data into impact and build a future-proof career.
keyPoints: Visualize data into powerful business insights.
Learn directly from top industry mentors.
Master predictive analytics and automation.
Build a job-ready portfolio with real projects.

heading: Why choose

title: 13 Years of
Legacy
(Commitment, Growth, Success)

content.value: The Data Analytics Certification Course at Teksversity is a career-transforming program designed to help learners master the art of turning data into strategic decisions. Recognized as one of the best data analytics online courses, it blends real-world business cases with advanced analytics tools like

, Power BI, Tableau, and SQL. The curriculum is curated by industry leaders, ensuring learners gain expertise in the most in-demand technologies driving today’s data economy. Every lesson combines innovation, application, and insight essential for data-driven professionals.

description.firstDescription: As an advanced data analytics course, Teksversity focuses on practical learning through interactive simulations, data storytelling workshops, and live projects. Students dive deep into topics such as predictive analytics, data visualization, and statistical modeling to develop job-ready skills. The program’s flexible online format enables professionals and students to learn at their own pace while receiving expert mentorship. It’s a complete ecosystem built to help learners confidently analyze, interpret, and transform complex datasets into business value.

description.secondDescription: Among all data analysis certification courses, Teksversity stands out for its career-oriented training and strong industry integration. Learners gain exposure to real datasets from global companies, participate in live analytics challenges, and prepare for interviews with personalized guidance. With its focus on both technical skills and professional readiness, the Data Analytics Certification Program empowers students to become future-ready data experts capable of leading business intelligence initiatives in a rapidly evolving digital landscape.

keyPoints: Master Python, SQL, and Power BI for real-world analytics.
Learn about ML, automation, and cloud-integrated data workflows.
Work on enterprise-grade projects with industry datasets.
Stay aligned with the latest analytics innovations.
Build live dashboards and predictive models.
Work on ETL pipelines and data storytelling.
Solve real business problems using analytics tools.
Apply insights across multiple industry domains.
Train certified data experts and mentors.
Join live data labs and project reviews.
Get personalized technical and career guidance.
Gain exposure to enterprise analytics systems.
Access AI-driven career guidance and interview prep.
Earn a globally recognized Certification.
Get placement support with top data-driven companies.
Launch your career in analytics, BI, or data science.

testimonialCards.name: Vishal
testimonialCards.review: I took a Data science with ai , IIT Certification course and tejaswi mam helped me to get into the Best course, now I got a job in Accent company with 6.5lpa. Thank you Teksversity Team and special thanks to madam .

testimonialCards.name: Vinitha P
testimonialCards.review: This Dual Certification course in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics is fantastic. The trainers are knowledgeable and the practical projects helped me apply concepts effectively. A must for anyone looking to excel in marketing and analytics!

testimonialCards.name: sadhana chittennoju
testimonialCards.review: I enrolled in the online Data Science course at Teksversity in March 2025. The Python, ML modules, real-world projects, and weekly assignments were very useful. Good placement support. It helped me build a strong portfolio. Great for career switchers

testimonialCards.name: Arun Pasunuri
testimonialCards.course: Data Science with AI and ML
testimonialCards.review: Joining TEKSVERSITY changed the way I learn. The dual certification programs boosted my confidence, and the hands-on training gave me real industry experience. Their zero down-payment EMI support truly helps students. TEKSVERSITY inspires you to grow.

testimonialCards.name: Ramadevi Koduri
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is the best place to learn dual certification in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics. I wanted to study two relevant courses for my MBA, and their counsellor guided me perfectly. I enrolled in both programs with confidence.

testimonialCards.name: Meghana
testimonialCards.review: My experience with Teksversity was amazing! The counselling session with Sireesha Reddy ma’am at Secunderabad helped me choose the right course. She patiently cleared all my doubts and gave great career clarity.

testimonialCards.name: Divya Peddiwar
testimonialCards.course: Data Science and Python full stack
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is where growth meets opportunity! Their dual courses and online degree programs helped me learn in multiple directions. The mentors boosted my skills and confidence, and the experience truly transformed the way I learn.

testimonialCards.name: Gayathri Prayaga
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity Education Institution exceeded my expectations! The faculty is knowledgeable and supportive. The curriculum is relevant and industry-focused. I appreciated the career services and opportunities provided. Highly recommended!

testimonialCards.name: Raghavenderan G
testimonialCards.review: Great institute with quality education at an affordable price. They offer trending, industry-ready courses and practical, supportive teaching. Their tie-ups with top universities add huge value. Highly recommended for strong learning and career growth.

testimonialCards.name: Laxmi Gayathri Chelimeda
testimonialCards.review: I took the Data Science course at Teksversity and gained strong practical, hands-on knowledge. The mentors were very supportive and explained concepts clearly. I’m also grateful for the career opportunity I received. A great learning experience

faq.question: What is the Data Analytics Certification Course at Teksversity?
faq.answer: It’s a career-focused program delivering in-depth training on essential data analytics concepts, tools, and hands-on applications to prepare you as a proficient data analyst.

faq.question: What are the primary objectives of Teksversity’s Data Analytics Training?
faq.answer: To develop expertise in data collection, analysis, visualization, and interpretation using industry-standard tools to confidently solve real-world analytics problems.

faq.question: Do you provide online classes for the Testing Tools Certification Course?
faq.answer: Yes, our course features live online classes led by expert instructors. These interactive sessions allow you to learn flexibly, participate actively, and gain practical skills—all from wherever you are.

faq.question: Who is eligible to enroll in the Data Analytics Certification Course?
faq.answer: Our program is open to freshers, working professionals, and anyone keen on starting a career in data analytics. Basic computer skills are helpful, but no prior experience is required.

faq.question: Which core tools and technologies are covered in the Data Analytics Training?
faq.answer: Our course offers hands-on training in Python, R, SQL, Tableau, Power BI, and Excel—the essential tools data analysts rely on worldwide.

faq.question: Does the course include real-time projects and practical training?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We integrate real-time projects and case studies into our training to give you hands-on experience that reflects real industry challenges.

faq.question: What career opportunities can I expect after completing this Data Analytics Course?
faq.answer: Graduates can pursue roles like Data Analyst, Business Intelligence Analyst, Data Scientist, and Analytics Consultant across diverse industries worldwide.

faq.question: What is the average salary potential for data analytics professionals trained at Teksversity?
faq.answer: Entry-level professionals typically earn ₹4 to ₹7 lakhs per annum, with significant salary growth as experience and specialization increase.

faq.question: Are there prerequisites or prior skills required for this Data Analytics Training?
faq.answer: No strict prerequisites are needed, but a basic understanding of math and statistics will enhance your learning experience.

faq.question: How can I enroll in the Data Analytics Certification Course at Teksversity?
faq.answer: Enrollment is simple—just visit our website or reach out to our admissions team for personalized support to kickstart your analytics career.
